entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop whose germplasm accessions were analyzed for oil content.

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of oil present in groundnut samples, measured using different methods.

entities.name: SOXHLET EXTRACTION
entities.description: A standard extraction procedure using petroleum ether to determine oil content.

entities.name: NUCLEAR MAGNETIC RESONANCE SPECTROMETRY
entities.description: A rapid, easy, accurate, and non-destructive method for analyzing oil content.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to compare and predict values between Soxhlet extraction and NMR spectrometry.
